title: Values, Expressions, Names, and Types · Program Brief: Python Numeric Expressions
summary: Build a transparent unit and budget calculator whose intermediate values can be inspected and tested. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use integers, floating-point values, decimal-sensitive decisions, arithmetic precedence, and division operators accurately.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
